moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are nearing their climax, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals scheduled for the upcoming weekend, following two weeks of intense grass-court action in London.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The scent of strawberries and cream is in the air – it's finals weekend at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for the singles titles?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are there any British contenders left to cheer on as Wimbledon reaches its thrilling conclusion? Every serve, every volley counts!

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix is underway this weekend at Silverstone, with qualifying and sprint races today, leading up to the main race on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Engines roaring, hearts pounding! It's the British Grand Prix weekend at Silverstone. Who's your pick for the podium?

angles.name: Home Favourites
angles.copy: All eyes on Silverstone! Can the British drivers make their mark on home soil? Get ready for high-speed drama.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, continues daily on ITV2 and ITVX, with the islanders navigating new couplings and challenges ahead of the anticipated final later in July.

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama in the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up and who's cracking on tonight?

angles.name: Hot Topic
angles.copy: That latest Love Island episode has got everyone talking! What's your biggest takeaway from the villa today?

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Cancellation Still Being Discussed
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026, scheduled for July 10-12 in London, was cancelled in April after headliner Ye's (Kanye West) UK entry was denied, sparking ongoing discussion in the music industry about festival planning.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Remember Wireless Festival 2026? What could have been. Still gutted about the cancellation or looking forward to next year's line-up?

angles.name: Industry Talk
angles.copy: Wireless Festival was due to kick off next week, but the cancellation has left a big hole in the summer calendar. What does this mean for other festivals?

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone!
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles,' turns 31 today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday today! What's your favourite track from the genre-blending superstar?

angles.name: Music Choice
angles.copy: It's Post Malone's birthday! Time to blast some of his biggest anthems. Which one are you spinning first?

moments.title: John Waite Turns 74 Today
moments.blurb: English singer and songwriter John Waite, famous for his solo hit 'Missing You' and fronting The Babys and Bad English, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary John Waite! 'Missing You' is still an absolute classic. What's your favourite of his tracks?

angles.name: 80s Anthems
angles.copy: From The Babys to Bad English and his solo career, John Waite gave us some huge tunes. Celebrating his birthday by turning up the volume!

moments.title: Huey Lewis Celebrates 76th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love,' turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to Huey Lewis! The News still sounds as good as ever. What's your go-to Huey Lewis & The News song?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Huey Lewis is 76 tomorrow! Get ready to feel the 'Power of Love' and other classics. What's your favourite movie soundtrack moment featuring his music?

moments.title: RZA of Wu-Tang Clan Turns 57
moments.blurb: American rapper and producer RZA, leader of the iconic hip-hop group Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! Wu-Tang Clan forever. What's your top track from the mastermind?

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: Tomorrow is RZA's birthday! Celebrating the beats and rhymes of a true hip-hop architect. Which Wu-Tang album is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Spandau Ballet's John Keeble is 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for the iconic British new wave band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: 80s Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble of Spandau Ballet! Get those 80s anthems ready for a celebration!

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Spandau Ballet's John Keeble turns 67. Which 'True Gold' classic is your favourite to blast?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, known for his influential hip-hop career, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent! From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop,' he defined an era. What's your favourite 50 Cent track?

angles.name: 00s Throwback
angles.copy: Tomorrow, 50 Cent turns 51! Get ready for some serious 00s hip-hop throwbacks to celebrate the legend.

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and former Beatle, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Peace and love to the legendary drummer.

angles.name: Iconic Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating Ringo Starr's 86th birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite Beatles track with his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: American musician, singer-songwriter, and producer Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes or solo track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Jack White turns 51 in a few days! Get ready to crank up some raw, blues-infused rock to celebrate.

moments.title: Mavis Staples' 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, a member of The Staple Singers and a celebrated solo artist, turns 87 on July 10th.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a magnificent 87th Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples! Her voice is pure soul. What's your favourite Staple Singers or Mavis solo track?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Mavis Staples turns 87 in a few days! Celebrate a true living legend of music by listening to her incredible catalogue.

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67
moments.blurb: American guitarist, singer, and songwriter Richie Sambora, best known as the long-time lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi legend Richie Sambora! Get ready to rock out to some classic anthems.

angles.name: Guitar Riffs
angles.copy: Richie Sambora turns 67 tomorrow! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar riff he gave us?

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12th, ahead of the main tournament play from July 16th-19th.

angles.name: Golf Excitement Builds
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale this weekend as practice days for The Open Championship begin! Who are you hoping takes home the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Road to the Claret Jug
angles.copy: It's almost time for The Open! Practice days start Sunday. Get ready for a week of incredible golf.

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Approaching
moments.blurb: School summer holidays across the UK are set to begin from around July 22nd-23rd, marking the start of the longest break for students.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! UK school summer holidays officially begin in less than three weeks. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Summer Fun Prep
angles.copy: Summer holidays are just around the corner! Getting ready for family adventures or a well-deserved break?
